title: AgilePrinciple
description: One of the 12 principles of the Agile Manifesto that guide agile software development practices.

number.description: The principle number (1-12) from the Agile Manifesto.

principle.description: The text of the agile principle.
principle.example: Our highest priority is to satisfy the customer through early and continuous delivery of valuable software.

framework_alignment.description: Agile frameworks that directly align with this principle.
